userText: We should raise awareness of the life changes what bring from AI.
correctedText: We should raise awareness of the changes that AI is bringing to our lives.
generalAdvice: 你已经抓住了 raise awareness of... 这个大骨架。下一步重点是后面名词短语的自然组织方式。

issues.note: the life changes 这里不自然，更自然的是 the changes that AI is bringing to our lives 或 AI-driven changes in daily life。
issues.suggestion: 描述‘AI 带来的变化’时，优先用 the changes that AI is bringing to our lives 这类完整名词短语。

issues.note: what bring from AI 结构不对。这里需要一个修饰 changes 的定语从句，如 that AI is bringing ...。
issues.suggestion: 先稳住核心骨架：the changes that AI is bringing to ...。
